name: contact-form
description: TD contact form. Name + email + message + submit, validated with zod. Posts to an action prop.

td.deps_rationale: react-hook-form + zod + @hookform/resolvers are the de-facto pairing for typed, validated forms in shadcn ecosystem. Reused across every TD pilot that ships a contact form. Alternative (manual state + ad-hoc validation) costs more LOC and breaks accessibility patterns.
